title: Working of Uttar Pradesh State Industrial Development Authority (UPSIDA)
publisher: Comptroller and Auditor General of India
source_title: Report of the Comptroller and Auditor General of India on Working of Uttar Pradesh State Industrial Development Authority (UPSIDA), Report No. 14 of 2025
why_selected: Recent state-level performance audit with unusually broad evidence across planning, contracts, plot allotment, and financial controls.
selection_notes: Strong benchmark item because many visible failures exist, but the real bottleneck is foundational planning and governance rather than any one transactional irregularity.
